opinion.h4: DIAMOND v. LOUISIANA. CERTIORARI TO THE SUPREME COURT OF LOUISIANA. No. 100. Argued February 20, 1964. Decided February 24, 1964.
opinion.p: James M. Nabrit III argued the cause for petitioner. With him on the brief were Jack Greenberg, Wiley A. Branton and Johnnie A. Jones.
Ralph L. Roy argued the cause for respondent. With him on the brief was Jack P. F. Gremillion, Attorney General of Louisiana.
The writ of certiorari is dismissed as improvidently granted.
